input.query: Vercel deploy passes but production crashes with env vars undefined

lessons.title: Vercel env vars are case-sensitive between build and runtime
lessons.content: Build-time substitution differs from runtime resolution. Lowercase one place, uppercase the other crashes production.

lessons.title: Production environment variables must be set explicitly in the dashboard
lessons.content: Local .env files do not propagate to Vercel. Set production vars in the project settings dashboard before each deploy.

lessons.title: Build-time vs runtime config in Next.js
lessons.content: NEXT_PUBLIC_ vars are baked into the bundle at build; server-only vars resolve at runtime per request.

lessons.title: Tailwind purge configuration
lessons.content: Tailwind purge needs to know which files to scan or production CSS is enormous.
